state.description: Last recorded auth state; listing does not run an active probe.

model.description: Model slug to pass as codexOptions.model.

serviceTiers.description: Selectable service tiers advertised for this model, including Fast when available.

effort.description: Reasoning effort for this turn. Supported values depend on the selected Codex model.

model.description: Codex model for this turn. Overrides the selected configuration profile; when omitted, the profile or Codex default applies.

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema used to constrain the final assistant message for the turn.

serviceTier.description: Codex service-tier id for this turn, such as a Fast tier advertised by the selected model.

ModelListResponse.description: Codex model, reasoning-effort, modality, personality, and service-tier capabilities for this auth principal and profile.

authPrincipalId.description: Optional assertion of the trusted owner-to-principal mapping configured by the host.

profile.description: Immutable Codex auth profile for the lifetime of this broker thread.

codexOptions.description: Per-turn Codex options. Values override the selected configuration profile without modifying it.

profile.description: Optional consistency assertion; it must equal the thread's immutable auth profile.

200.description: SSE event stream of BrokerEvent JSON payloads
